# Systemic CRM

> CRM-система для малого та середнього бізнесу в Україні. Клієнти, записи, продажі, склад, фінанси та комунікації — все в одній системі.

## What is Systemic?

Systemic is a cloud-based CRM (Customer Relationship Management) system designed for small and medium businesses in Ukraine. It runs entirely in the browser — no installation needed. Available in Ukrainian and English.

## Key Features

- **Client Database**: Client cards with visit history, purchases, contacts, categories, tags. Search and filter by any field.
- **Appointment Calendar**: Drag-and-drop calendar with recurring appointments, multiple services per booking, and staff filtering.
- **Sales & Orders**: Full order lifecycle — create, confirm, pack, ship. Nova Poshta delivery integration with automatic waybill (TTN) creation.
- **Inventory Management**: Products, stock levels, purchases, stock movements. Automatic write-off on sales.
- **Financial Module**: Transactions, cash register, shifts, P&L reports. Real-time financial overview.
- **Telegram Bot**: Two-way messaging with clients, automatic appointment reminders directly in Telegram.
- **Payroll & Motivation**: Flexible compensation schemes — service percentage, fixed rate, bonuses. Automatic calculation.
- **Fiscal Receipts**: Integration with Checkbox (Ukrainian fiscal register) for compliant fiscal receipts.
- **Multi-location**: Support for multiple business locations with separate staff, schedules, and inventory.
- **Role-based Access**: Granular permissions — owner, admin, manager, master roles with 27+ permission keys.

## Target Audience

- Beauty salons, barbershops, nail studios
- Fitness studios, yoga centers
- Medical clinics, dental offices
- Service businesses with appointments
- Small retail with inventory needs
- Any SMB needing client management + scheduling + finances

## Pricing

- **Starter (Free)**: 1 location, up to 2 staff, calendar, client base, basic finances
- **Business (499 UAH/mo)**: Up to 5 locations, unlimited staff, full features, Telegram bot, priority support
- **Enterprise (Custom)**: Unlimited locations, API access, custom integrations, dedicated manager, SLA

## Tech Stack

- Frontend: React 18 SPA
- Backend: Vercel Serverless Functions
- Database: Firebase Firestore
- Auth: Firebase Authentication
- Integrations: Telegram Bot API, Nova Poshta API, Checkbox API, Turbo SMS

## Links

- Website: https://systemic-crm.com
- App: https://app.systemic-crm.com
- Contact: hello@systemic-crm.com

## Languages

- Ukrainian (primary)
- English
